faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.titleDescription: Learn all you need to know about Prune. Here’s how to use each of our products, step by step.

faqItem.question: What is Prune Payments?
faqItem.answer: Prune Payments is a modern payment platform that helps businesses and individuals accept, send, and manage payments securely and efficiently.

faqItem.question: Who can use Prune Payments?
faqItem.answer: Prune Payments is built for startups, SMEs, and growing businesses, as well as individuals who need reliable digital payment solutions.

faqItem.question: What payment methods are supported?
faqItem.answer: We support bank transfers and other local payment options, with more methods being added as we expand.

faqItem.question: How secure is Prune Payments?
faqItem.answer: Security is a top priority. We use industry-standard encryption and best practices to protect your data and transactions.

faqItem.question: How long do transactions take?
faqItem.answer: Most transactions are processed instantly or within minutes. In rare cases, bank processing times may cause slight delays.

faqItem.question: Are there any hidden fees?
faqItem.answer: No. All fees are transparent and clearly communicated before you complete any transaction.

faqItem.question: Can I track my transactions?
faqItem.answer: Yes. Your dashboard provides a clear history of all payments, transfers, and transaction statuses in real time.

faqItem.question: Is Prune Payments available outside Nigeria?
faqItem.answer: We’re starting in Nigeria, with plans to expand to other markets. Availability updates will be announced as we grow.

faqItem.question: How do I get started?
faqItem.answer: Simply create an account, complete the required verification steps, and you’ll be ready to start accepting or sending payments.
